name: pm-server
description: Read-only project-management Lens for Claude Desktop/Cowork. Surfaces tasks, blockers, memory, and dashboards from a project's .pm/ store; writes are structurally disabled.
long_description: PM Server is a project-management MCP server. This .mcpb bundle ships it in Lens mode (PM_LENS=1): only the read-only tool allowlist (pm_status, pm_next, pm_tasks, pm_blockers, pm_recall, pm_memory_search, pm_memory_stats, pm_dashboard, pm_risks, pm_velocity, pm_list, pm_knowledge_query, pm_workflow_status, pm_workflow_list, pm_workflow_templates) is registered. Mutators and subprocess paths are structurally unreachable (ADR-015/017/018). SQLite is opened with mode=ro&immutable=1 so the Desktop/Cowork host never creates -wal/-shm sidecars in another project's .pm/ (PMSERV-080).

project_path.title: Project root
project_path.description: Absolute path to a project directory containing .pm/project.yaml. Leave blank to let the host pass workspace roots via MCP roots, or rely on the single-project auto-pick from ~/.pm/registry.yaml (PMSERV-082).
